description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/nestal/spaghetti and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named build_spag in the build stage that runs the exact shell commands: mkdir build/, cd build, cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release .., make all, ./unittest, and make package. Configure the job to publish the generated RPM files matching build/*.rpm as an artifact named ${CI_BUILD_NAME}_${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
